prestazioni: F133F 5.7L V12 (65° DOHC 48V) engine upgrade with Novitec Rosso's 'Ferrari 612 Scaglietti N-Largo' Stage 3 kit, including forged internals (Mahle pistons, Carrillo H-beam rods), ported/polished cylinder heads with upgraded titanium valves, and a custom Novitec Rosso ECU remap targeting 680 HP at 7,800 RPM with 580 Nm of torque at 6,000 RPM

Full titanium exhaust system by Capristo, featuring 304 stainless steel headers, 200-cell metallic catalytic converters, and a dual-mode valved rear section with Inconel 625 mufflers for a 12 kg weight reduction and +35 HP gain

Öhlins TTX46 coilover suspension with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and high/low-speed compression), custom valved for the 612's aluminum spaceframe, paired with Eibach ERS race springs (20% stiffer front, 15% stiffer rear) and spherical bearing upper mounts by SuperPro
estetica: Novitec Rosso 'N-Largo' widebody conversion kit, including carbon fiber front fenders with integrated air vents, rear quarter panels with side skirts, and a custom front splitter with canards (all made from pre-preg autoclave carbon fiber, 2x2 twill weave)

Custom 20-inch front / 21-inch rear forged aluminum wheels by HRE (FF15 model), 9.5J ET35 front and 12J ET45 rear, with titanium wheel bolts and Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30 ZR20 front, 345/25 ZR21 rear)

Full carbon fiber interior overhaul by Zago, including a custom Alcantara-wrapped dashboard with exposed carbon fiber weave, Recaro Pole Position bucket seats (carbon shell, FIA-approved), and a MOMO Prototipo steering wheel with integrated AIM MXS Strada data display
